title: Boom Boom
why_this_song: Boom Boom by John Lee Hooker (1961) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "And when you talking to me that baby talk"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "And when you talking to me that baby talk"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Boom, boom, boom, boom"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Walk the walk baby"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm gonna shoot you right down"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "talk" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "talk" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I'm gonna shoot you right down
I can't take it like that

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask John Lee Hooker one question about "Boom Boom", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para John Lee Hooker sobre "Boom Boom", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Boom Boom" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Boom Boom" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Boom Boom" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Boom Boom" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
